title: Light Buttery Slovakian Tiger Prawns Fried Rice
description: A paleo-friendly twist on a classic Slovakian dish, featuring tender tiger prawns and a buttery flavor, this recipe is a nostalgic and delicious meal option.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the tiger prawns and cook until pink and fully cooked, about 4 minutes.
Remove the prawns from the skillet and set aside.
Add the unsalted butter to the skillet and let it melt.
Add the cauliflower rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the butter and cook for about 5 minutes.
Return the cooked prawns to the skillet and stir to combine with the rice.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
